goal: Split validate_repo() into focused functions, optimize rglob, update schema, final cleanup

tasks.name: Split validate_repo() into focused functions
tasks.action: Extract 5 sub-validators from the 233-line monolith, keep validate_repo() as orchestrator

tasks.name: Optimize rglob with WORKFLOW.json packages
tasks.action: Use packages[] from WORKFLOW.json when available, fall back to rglob only when needed

tasks.name: Update WORKFLOW.schema.json and final cleanup
tasks.action: Add agentTeams to schema, add sensitive files to .gitignore, fix PEP 8 spacing

commitMessage: fix(review-findings-remediation): refactor validator, schema update, final cleanup
